articles.summary: Po pierwszych dniach obowiązywania nowych regulacji można stwierdzić, że mechanizm CPN zadziałał – ceny paliw na stacjach spadły. Warto jednak jasno zaznaczyć: głównym czynnikiem tego spadku są obniżki podatkowe, a nie sama regulacja marż. Sprzyja temu też sytuacja na ryn

articles.title: Tom Brady, famed health nut, explains his junk food endorsements in retirement: 'Moderation in all things'
articles.summary: Tom Brady has struck a new partnership with chocolate maker Ferrero pegged to the 2026 World Cup.

articles.title: Mercedes U.S. CEO sets ambitious sales goal despite 'tougher' market than anticipated
articles.summary: Mercedes is investing $4 billion in its Alabama plant through 2030 in a push to increase production as the automaker targets a 28% rise in U.S. car sales.

articles.title: Novo Nordisk launches multi-month subscriptions for Wegovy obesity drugs as it tries to catch up with Eli Lilly
articles.summary: Longer subscriptions offer lower monthly pricing, with people expected to save up to $1,200 a year on the injection and as much as $600 a year on the pill.

articles.title: Lilly to spend up to $7.8 billion to acquire Centessa, a maker of experimental sleep disorder drugs
articles.summary: Centessa is one of several companies working on a new class of drugs to treat narcolepsy, a condition that makes it difficult for people to stay awake.

articles.title: 'Project Hail Mary' is the box office proof point Amazon MGM has been waiting for
articles.summary: Amazon and MGM promised to spend around $1 billion each year on theatrical releases, a figure that would fund between 12 and 15 films annually.

articles.title: McCormick buys Unilever's food business in deal that values it at nearly $45 billion
articles.summary: McCormick will pay a combination of cash and equity to expand further into condiments and spreads.

articles.title: Opendoor acquires Doma's closing and escrow business in bid to lower mortgage refinance costs
articles.summary: Doma's technology has been used in a Fannie Mae pilot program designed to reduce title insurance costs on eligible refinance transactions.

articles.title: Delta Air Lines taps Amazon Leo for in-flight Wi-Fi as streaming wars heat up
articles.summary: Delta says the Amazon Leo in-flight Wi-Fi will be available starting in 2028 on 500 initial aircraft.

articles.title: Logan Paul sold a Pokémon card for more than $16 million. Here's why investors are watching
articles.summary: Some rare Pokémon cards are fetching huge prices and yielding better returns than the S&P 500.

articles.title: JetBlue Airways raises checked bag fees at least $4 as fuel prices soar
articles.summary: Airfare has climbed for routes around the world, driven by higher fuel prices since the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran.

articles.title: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
articles.summary: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.

articles.title: NFL asks prediction market operators to refrain from 'objectionable bets'
articles.summary: Unlike leagues such as the NHL, MLB and MLS that have embraced platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket, the NFL is taking a more cautious stance.
